# Document Localizer

AI-powered document localization tool that transforms documents between American and British English.

## What It Does

- Transform documents between American and British English variants
- Works entirely on your local machine - documents never leave your computer
- PDF and Markdown support
- Side-by-side diff review before export

## How It Works

1. Upload PDF or Markdown files
2. Select source and target locales (e.g., American English → British English)
3. AI localizes the content locally via Ollama, LM Studio, or llama.cpp
4. Review changes in a diff view
5. Export approved documents

## System Requirements

- macOS 12+
- Local AI backend (Ollama, LM Studio, or llama.cpp)
- 4GB+ RAM (8GB recommended)
- ~5GB disk per AI model

## Links

- Downloads: https://github.com/zimablue-io/document-localizer/releases
- Source Code: https://github.com/zimablue-io/document-localizer
- Issues: https://github.com/zimablue-io/document-localizer/issues

## Supported Platforms

Currently available for macOS only.
Windows and Linux builds are planned.
